EMO.label: Emotional / loaded language
EMO.description: Uses emotionally charged words to bypass critical thinking

URG.label: Urgency / pressure
URG.description: Creates artificial time pressure to discourage verification

ANON.label: Anonymous / unverified source
ANON.description: Cites unnamed sources or absent attribution

MISS.label: Missing context / sourcing
MISS.description: Omits key facts a reader would need to verify the claim

FAB.label: Fabricated specifics
FAB.description: Includes invented numbers, dates, or quotes

POL.label: Polarization framing
POL.description: Frames the issue as us-vs-them to amplify outrage

CONS.label: Consistency with prior statement
CONS.description: Contradicts or distorts what the candidate previously said

DISC.label: Discrediting frame
DISC.description: Attempts to delegitimize a person/institution without evidence

IMP.label: Impersonation cue
IMP.description: Imitates a credible source's branding or voice

REV.label: Historical revisionism
REV.description: Rewrites a known historical fact in a misleading way

ENDO.label: False endorsement
ENDO.description: Falsely attributes endorsement to a person/group

RECF.label: Recycled / context-stripped media
RECF.description: Reuses old footage/photos out of their original context

CREDIBLE.label: Credible / verifiable
CREDIBLE.description: Links to or names a verifiable source

EMO/fake/novice.phrase_tl: Ang post na ito ay puno ng salitang gumigising sa galit imbis na magbigay ng patunay.
EMO/fake/novice.phrase_en: This post leans on anger-triggering words instead of evidence.
EMO/fake/novice.verifier_action: Tanungin: 'May ebidensya ba o emosyon lang?'

EMO/fake/novice.phrase_tl: Maraming "matinding" salita pero kakaunti ang konkretong impormasyon — palatandaan ng manipulasyon.
EMO/fake/novice.phrase_en: Lots of intense words, very little concrete information — a manipulation cue.
EMO/fake/novice.verifier_action: Hanapin ang aktwal na pangyayari, hindi ang reaksyon.

EMO/fake/novice.phrase_tl: Kapag binubuhos sa iyo ang galit o takot, bumagal ka muna bago mag-share.
EMO/fake/novice.phrase_en: When a post floods you with anger or fear, slow down before sharing.
EMO/fake/novice.verifier_action: Mag-pause: ano ang naramdaman ko, at bakit ginusto ng post na maramdaman ko ito?

EMO/fake/proficient.phrase_tl: Ginagamit ang "loaded language" para mag-frame na walang ebidensya — tradisyunal na taktika ng disinformation.
EMO/fake/proficient.phrase_en: Uses loaded language to frame an evidence-free claim — a classic disinformation tactic.
EMO/fake/proficient.verifier_action: Subukan i-rewrite ang claim sa neutral na salita. May matitira pa bang aktwal na claim?

EMO/fake/proficient.phrase_tl: Ang mga salitang tulad ng "traydor" o "tagapagligtas" ay nagdadala ng emosyonal na bagahe na pumipigil sa kritikal na pagsusuri.
EMO/fake/proficient.phrase_en: Words like 'traitor' or 'savior' carry emotional baggage that blocks critical evaluation.
EMO/fake/proficient.verifier_action: Hanapin: ano ang ebidensya bukod sa mga adjektibong ito?

EMO/fake/proficient.phrase_tl: Pinapasok ka sa isang emosyonal na frame bago mo pa nakikita ang aktwal na claim.
EMO/fake/proficient.phrase_en: It pushes you into an emotional frame before you've even seen the actual claim.
EMO/fake/proficient.verifier_action: Hatiin: alisin ang adjektibo, basahin lang ang verb at noun.

EMO/fake/advanced.phrase_tl: Ang emotional priming ay strategic — para nakikita mo na agad na "masama" o "mabuti" bago ka pa magtanong.
EMO/fake/advanced.phrase_en: Emotional priming is strategic — it primes you to read 'bad' or 'good' before asking any questions.
EMO/fake/advanced.verifier_action: Suriin ang authorial intent: bakit pinili ang ganitong word choice?

EMO/fake/advanced.phrase_tl: Ang mga emosyonal na salitang ito ay tipikal na binubuo ng coordinated networks para mag-amplify ng partikular na narrative.
EMO/fake/advanced.phrase_en: These emotional word patterns are often crafted by coordinated networks to amplify a specific narrative.
EMO/fake/advanced.verifier_action: Tingnan kung pareho ang choice of words sa ibang posts mula sa parehong panahon.

EMO/fake/advanced.phrase_tl: Sa Pilipinong elektoral na konteksto, ang emotional framing ay madalas tumatama sa identity-based loyalties imbis sa policy.
EMO/fake/advanced.phrase_en: In the Philippine electoral context, emotional framing typically targets identity-based loyalties rather than policy.
EMO/fake/advanced.verifier_action: Itanong: ano ba talaga ang policy claim, at sino ang nakikinabang sa emotional na framing?

EMO/real/novice.phrase_tl: Ang post na ito ay gumagamit ng kalmado at konkretong salita imbis na emosyonal na mga adjektibo.
EMO/real/novice.phrase_en: This post uses calm, concrete language instead of emotional adjectives.
EMO/real/novice.verifier_action: Pansinin: ang tono ay informative, hindi panghihimok.

EMO/real/novice.phrase_tl: Walang masyadong panghikayat dito — focus sa fact, hindi sa feeling.
EMO/real/novice.phrase_en: There's not much persuasion language here — the focus is on facts, not feelings.
EMO/real/novice.verifier_action: I-check kung ang facts ay maaaring i-verify sa ibang source.

EMO/real/novice.phrase_tl: Ang neutral na pananalita ay isang magandang tanda ng credible reporting.
EMO/real/novice.phrase_en: Neutral language is a good sign of credible reporting.

EMO/real/proficient.phrase_tl: Ang absence ng loaded vocabulary ay nag-iinvite sa reader na mag-evaluate ng evidence sa sariling pace.
EMO/real/proficient.phrase_en: The absence of loaded vocabulary invites the reader to evaluate evidence at their own pace.
EMO/real/proficient.verifier_action: Mag-rate: gaano ka-balanced ang pagkakapahayag ng claim?

EMO/real/proficient.phrase_tl: Ang pagiging informative imbis na inflammatory ay isang structural feature ng credible journalism.
EMO/real/proficient.phrase_en: Being informative rather than inflammatory is a structural feature of credible journalism.
EMO/real/proficient.verifier_action: Compare ang tone nito sa coverage ng parehong topic sa ibang outlet.

EMO/real/proficient.phrase_tl: Walang pagdadagdag ng emotional framing — basta nakapresenta ang facts.
EMO/real/proficient.phrase_en: No emotional framing added — the facts are simply presented.
EMO/real/proficient.verifier_action: Hanapin ang specific claims at i-verify isa-isa.

EMO/real/advanced.phrase_tl: Ang restraint sa salita ay nagbibigay ng mas mataas na epistemic value sa reader, dahil hinahayaan kang magpasya base sa data.
EMO/real/advanced.phrase_en: Linguistic restraint gives the reader higher epistemic value by letting you decide based on data.
EMO/real/advanced.verifier_action: Suriin ang pagkakatugma ng tono at kalidad ng evidence.

EMO/real/advanced.phrase_tl: Ang neutral na framing ay isang ethical signal — nagsasabi ng "trust your reasoning, not my emotions."
EMO/real/advanced.phrase_en: Neutral framing is an ethical signal — it says 'trust your reasoning, not my emotions.'
EMO/real/advanced.verifier_action: Compare sa propaganda outlets para makita ang structural na diperensya.

EMO/real/advanced.phrase_tl: Sa highly polarized Filipino media landscape, ang emotional restraint ay isang professional standard na bihirang sinusunod ng disinformation actors.
EMO/real/advanced.phrase_en: In the highly polarized Filipino media landscape, emotional restraint is a professional standard that disinformation actors rarely meet.
EMO/real/advanced.verifier_action: Tingnan ang publication's editorial standards — meron bang style guide na nagbabawal ng emotional language?

URG/fake/novice.phrase_tl: Sinasabihan kang mag-share "agad" o "ngayon na" — classic urgency trick.
URG/fake/novice.phrase_en: It tells you to share 'now' or 'immediately' — a classic urgency trick.
URG/fake/novice.verifier_action: Kapag pinapamadali, huminto. Ang totoong balita ay hindi expiry.

URG/fake/novice.phrase_tl: Walang dahilan para magmadali maliban kung gusto kang pigilan ng poster sa pag-verify.
URG/fake/novice.phrase_en: There's no reason for the rush unless the poster wants to stop you from verifying.
URG/fake/novice.verifier_action: Mag-tanong: ano ang masama kung mag-aabang ako ng 30 minuto?

URG/fake/novice.phrase_tl: Ang mga "kailangan i-share NGAYON" ay halos lahat manipulasyon.
URG/fake/novice.phrase_en: Posts saying 'must share NOW' are almost always manipulation.
URG/fake/novice.verifier_action: I-check sa news sites — kung totoo, magkakaroon ng coverage doon.

URG/fake/proficient.phrase_tl: Ang artificial urgency ay isang documented persuasion technique para i-bypass ang reflective thinking.
URG/fake/proficient.phrase_en: Artificial urgency is a documented persuasion technique to bypass reflective thinking.
URG/fake/proficient.verifier_action: Tanggalin ang urgency: still credible ba ang claim kung walang pressure?

URG/fake/proficient.phrase_tl: Ang pagtawag para sa "immediate action" ay tumatama sa system 1 thinking, hindi system 2.
URG/fake/proficient.phrase_en: Calls for 'immediate action' target system 1 thinking, not system 2.
URG/fake/proficient.verifier_action: Pumili ng deliberate evaluation — magbigay ng oras.

URG/fake/proficient.phrase_tl: Ang phrasing tulad ng "limited time" o "before they delete this" ay scarcity manipulation.
URG/fake/proficient.phrase_en: Phrasing like 'limited time' or 'before they delete this' is scarcity manipulation.
URG/fake/proficient.verifier_action: Tanungin: meron ba talagang time limit, o invented?

URG/fake/advanced.phrase_tl: Ang urgency framing ay nagiging effective lalo na sa election cycle dahil sa heightened attention at anxiety.
URG/fake/advanced.phrase_en: Urgency framing becomes especially effective during election cycles due to heightened attention and anxiety.
URG/fake/advanced.verifier_action: Recognize ang konteksto: mas vulnerable tayo sa urgency cues sa election season.

URG/fake/advanced.phrase_tl: Ang "share before censored" trope ay strategic — gumagawa ng forbidden-knowledge appeal.
URG/fake/advanced.phrase_en: The 'share before censored' trope is strategic — it creates a forbidden-knowledge appeal.
URG/fake/advanced.verifier_action: Suriin: kung totoong banned, paano pa ito nakikita?

URG/fake/advanced.phrase_tl: Sa Pilipinong context, ang urgency narratives ay tumutugma sa "hindi sinabi sa mainstream media" frames na strategic na binubuo.
URG/fake/advanced.phrase_en: In the Philippine context, urgency narratives align with strategically constructed 'mainstream media won't tell you' frames.
URG/fake/advanced.verifier_action: Compare claim sa actual mainstream coverage. May mismatch ba?

URG/real/novice.phrase_tl: Walang pressure dito na mag-share kaagad — calm, confident reporting.
URG/real/novice.phrase_en: There's no pressure here to share immediately — it reads as calm, confident reporting.
URG/real/novice.verifier_action: Pansinin ang absence ng "share now" cues.

URG/real/novice.phrase_tl: Ang post na ito ay walang artificial deadline.
URG/real/novice.phrase_en: This post doesn't push an artificial deadline.
URG/real/novice.verifier_action: Compare sa mga manipulative posts — may diperensya sa pacing.

URG/real/novice.phrase_tl: Hindi ka pinipilit ng poster — magandang sign.
URG/real/novice.phrase_en: The poster isn't rushing you — a good sign.
URG/real/novice.verifier_action: Magpatuloy sa verification ng underlying facts.

URG/real/proficient.phrase_tl: Ang absence ng urgency cues ay tumutugma sa standard journalistic pacing.
URG/real/proficient.phrase_en: Absence of urgency cues matches standard journalistic pacing.
URG/real/proficient.verifier_action: Verify ang specific claims sa established outlets.

URG/real/proficient.phrase_tl: Walang scarcity language o time-pressure devices — credible structural marker.
URG/real/proficient.phrase_en: No scarcity language or time-pressure devices — a credible structural marker.
URG/real/proficient.verifier_action: I-check ang publication's track record sa related stories.

URG/real/proficient.phrase_tl: Ang neutral pacing ay nagbibigay ng oras sa reader para mag-evaluate.
URG/real/proficient.phrase_en: Neutral pacing gives the reader time to evaluate.
URG/real/proficient.verifier_action: Gumamit ng oras na ibinigay — i-cross-check.

URG/real/advanced.phrase_tl: Ang journalistic restraint sa pacing ay reflects professional editorial standards na may rigorous fact-check pipeline.
URG/real/advanced.phrase_en: Editorial restraint in pacing reflects professional standards backed by rigorous fact-checking pipelines.
URG/real/advanced.verifier_action: Tingnan ang publication's stated editorial process.

URG/real/advanced.phrase_tl: Sa election season, ang absence ng manipulative urgency ay rare quality marker.
URG/real/advanced.phrase_en: During election season, the absence of manipulative urgency is a rare quality marker.
URG/real/advanced.verifier_action: I-benchmark sa volume of urgency-driven content sa parehong feed.

URG/real/advanced.phrase_tl: Ang decision to NOT amplify is itself an editorial position — credible outlets practice this.
URG/real/advanced.phrase_en: The decision to NOT amplify is itself an editorial position — credible outlets practice this.
URG/real/advanced.verifier_action: Suriin kung paano in-coverage ng outlet ang sensitive stories: balanced ba o hyped?

ANON/fake/novice.phrase_tl: Ang post ay nagpapakita ng anonymous / unverified source — direct na cue ng manipulasyon.
ANON/fake/novice.phrase_en: This post shows anonymous / unverified source — a direct manipulation cue.
ANON/fake/novice.verifier_action: Tanungin: meron ba talagang ebidensya o anonymous / unverified source lang?

ANON/fake/novice.phrase_tl: Ang ganitong palatandaan ay madalas na nasa fake na content.
ANON/fake/novice.phrase_en: This kind of cue is commonly found in fake content.
ANON/fake/novice.verifier_action: Hanapin ang underlying source, hindi ang surface.

ANON/fake/novice.phrase_tl: Pansinin ang anonymous / unverified source — pinaiisip ka nito ng walang ebidensya.
ANON/fake/novice.phrase_en: Notice the anonymous / unverified source — it makes you assume things without evidence.
ANON/fake/novice.verifier_action: Slow down at suriin ang specific claim.

ANON/fake/proficient.phrase_tl: Ang anonymous / unverified source ay strategic — ginagamit para mag-bypass ng critical evaluation.
ANON/fake/proficient.phrase_en: Anonymous / unverified source is strategic — used to bypass critical evaluation.
ANON/fake/proficient.verifier_action: I-rewrite ang claim ng walang manipulative element. Anong matitira?

ANON/fake/proficient.phrase_tl: Ang taktika na ito ay documented sa misinformation literature.
ANON/fake/proficient.phrase_en: This tactic is documented in misinformation literature.

ANON/fake/proficient.phrase_tl: Maipapakita mo ba ito sa originating source? Kapag hindi, maaaring fabricated.
ANON/fake/proficient.phrase_en: Can you trace this to an originating source? If not, it may be fabricated.
ANON/fake/proficient.verifier_action: Hanapin ang pinakamaagang public version ng claim.

ANON/fake/advanced.phrase_tl: Sa Pilipinong electoral context, ang anonymous / unverified source ay madalas na coordinated, hindi organic.
ANON/fake/advanced.phrase_en: In Philippine electoral context, anonymous / unverified source is often coordinated, not organic.
ANON/fake/advanced.verifier_action: Suriin kung pareho ang phrasing sa multiple accounts at panahon.

ANON/fake/advanced.phrase_tl: Ang structural na paggamit ng anonymous / unverified source ay nagsusumiwalat ng mas malalim na narrative goals.
ANON/fake/advanced.phrase_en: The structural use of anonymous / unverified source reveals deeper narrative goals.
ANON/fake/advanced.verifier_action: Tanungin: sino ang nakikinabang sa pagkalat nito?

ANON/fake/advanced.phrase_tl: Ang ganitong pattern ay typical sa disinformation networks na nagta-target ng identity-based loyalty.
ANON/fake/advanced.phrase_en: This pattern is typical of disinformation networks targeting identity-based loyalty.
ANON/fake/advanced.verifier_action: I-check ang amplification network: sino ang gumagaya?

ANON/real/novice.phrase_tl: Walang nakitang anonymous / unverified source sa post — magandang signal.
ANON/real/novice.phrase_en: No anonymous / unverified source detected in this post — a good signal.

ANON/real/novice.phrase_tl: Ang absence ng anonymous / unverified source ay tumutugma sa standard credible practice.
ANON/real/novice.phrase_en: Absence of anonymous / unverified source aligns with standard credible practice.
ANON/real/novice.verifier_action: Tingnan ang sourcing: may primary attribution ba?

ANON/real/novice.phrase_tl: Ang post na ito ay malinis sa palatandaang ito — sign ng disiplinadong reporting.
ANON/real/novice.phrase_en: This post is clean on this indicator — a sign of disciplined reporting.
ANON/real/novice.verifier_action: Cross-check ang facts sa established outlets.

ANON/real/proficient.phrase_tl: Ang absence ng anonymous / unverified source ay structural marker ng credible content.
ANON/real/proficient.phrase_en: Absence of anonymous / unverified source is a structural marker of credible content.

ANON/real/proficient.phrase_tl: Hindi nakikita ang taktika na ito — tumutugma sa professional journalism norms.
ANON/real/proficient.phrase_en: This tactic is not in evidence — consistent with professional journalism norms.
ANON/real/proficient.verifier_action: Compare ang post sa published news sa parehong topic.

ANON/real/proficient.phrase_tl: Walang manipulative element — focus lang sa traceable claims.
ANON/real/proficient.phrase_en: No manipulative element — just traceable claims.
ANON/real/proficient.verifier_action: Sundan ang attribution chain hanggang sa source.

ANON/real/advanced.phrase_tl: Ang systemic absence ng anonymous / unverified source sa post ay reflects rigorous editorial pipeline.
ANON/real/advanced.phrase_en: Systemic absence of anonymous / unverified source in this post reflects a rigorous editorial pipeline.
ANON/real/advanced.verifier_action: I-evaluate ang outlet's track record sa similar stories.

ANON/real/advanced.phrase_tl: Sa polarized environment, ang restraint mula sa anonymous / unverified source ay editorial choice.
ANON/real/advanced.phrase_en: In a polarized environment, restraint from anonymous / unverified source is a deliberate editorial choice.
ANON/real/advanced.verifier_action: Tingnan kung consistent ito sa outlet's overall portfolio.

ANON/real/advanced.phrase_tl: Ang decision na huwag gamitin ang anonymous / unverified source ay isang ethical signal — credible journalism.
ANON/real/advanced.phrase_en: The decision not to use anonymous / unverified source is an ethical signal — credible journalism.
ANON/real/advanced.verifier_action: Suriin ang publication's stated values vs. actual coverage.
